name: M4A4 | 星级
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. This memento from Cache has been painted with a star motif. Imogen shares her father's eye for quality, but her ambition is even fiercer
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把来自死城之谜的纪念武器使用星级图案进行了涂装。 伊莫金像她父亲一样苛求武器的品质，但她的抱负更甚
